'''korapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yeld|yeld]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yeld|yeld]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| korapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:korapithi|korapithi]] || [[word:korapiji|korapiji]] || [[word:korapishi|korapishi]] || [[word:korapiki|korapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:koraputhuthu|koraputhuthu]] || [[word:korapujuju|korapujuju]] || [[word:korapushushu|korapushushu]] || [[word:korapukuku|korapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:koraputhu|koraputhu]] || [[word:korapuju|korapuju]] || [[word:korapushu|korapushu]] || [[word:korapuku|korapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:korapufthuf|korapufthuf]] || [[word:korapufjuf|korapufjuf]] || [[word:korapufshuf|korapufshuf]] || [[word:korapufkuf|korapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:korapethe|korapethe]] || [[word:korapeje|korapeje]] || [[word:korapeshe|korapeshe]] || [[word:korapeke|korapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:korapothotho|korapothotho]] || [[word:korapojojo|korapojojo]] || [[word:koraposhosho|koraposhosho]] || [[word:korapokoko|korapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:korapotho|korapotho]] || [[word:korapojo|korapojo]] || [[word:koraposho|koraposho]] || [[word:korapoko|korapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:korapofthof|korapofthof]] || [[word:korapofjof|korapofjof]] || [[word:korapofshof|korapofshof]] || [[word:korapofkof|korapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:korapĂŻfthĂŻf|korapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:korapĂŻfjĂŻf|korapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:korapĂŻfshĂŻf|korapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:korapĂŻfkĂŻf|korapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:korapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|korapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:korapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|korapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:korapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|korapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:korapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|korapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:korapĂŻfthĂŻf|korapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:korapĂŻfjĂŻf|korapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:korapĂŻfshĂŻf|korapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:korapĂŻfkĂŻf|korapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:korapĂŻfthĂŻf|korapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:korapĂŻfjĂŻf|korapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:korapĂŻfshĂŻf|korapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:korapĂŻfkĂŻf|korapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:korapĂŠthĂŠ|korapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:korapĂŠjĂŠ|korapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:korapĂŠshĂŠ|korapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:korapĂŠkĂŠ|korapĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:korapathatha|korapathatha]] || [[word:korapajaja|korapajaja]] || [[word:korapashasha|korapashasha]] || [[word:korapakaka|korapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:korapatha|korapatha]] || [[word:korapaja|korapaja]] || [[word:korapasha|korapasha]] || [[word:korapaka|korapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:korapafthaf|korapafthaf]] || [[word:korapafjaf|korapafjaf]] || [[word:korapafshaf|korapafshaf]] || [[word:korapafkaf|korapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:korapasha|korapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:korapshĂ«sha|korapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koraprosha|koraprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:korapmusha|korapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:korapyasha|korapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokorapnkshĂ«sha|gokorapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokorapnkrosha|gokorapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokorapnkmusha|gokorapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokorapnkyasha|gokorapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:korarapasha|korarapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:korarapshĂ«sha|korarapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koraraprosha|koraraprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:korarapmusha|korarapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:korarapyasha|korarapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokorarapnkshĂ«sha|gokorarapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokorarapnkrosha|gokorarapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokorarapnkmusha|gokorarapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokorarapnkyasha|gokorarapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kerĂŠpasha|kerĂŠpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kerĂŠpshĂ«sha|kerĂŠpshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kerĂŠprosha|kerĂŠprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kerĂŠpmusha|kerĂŠpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kerĂŠpyasha|kerĂŠpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokerĂŠpnkshĂ«sha|gokerĂŠpnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokerĂŠpnkrosha|gokerĂŠpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokerĂŠpnkmusha|gokerĂŠpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokerĂŠpnkyasha|gokerĂŠpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:korfapasha|korfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:korfapshĂ«sha|korfapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:korfaprosha|korfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:korfapmusha|korfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:korfapyasha|korfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokorfapnkshĂ«sha|gokorfapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokorfapnkrosha|gokorfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokorfapnkmusha|gokorfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokorfapnkyasha|gokorfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
